subject: Google Finance 推出首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候
object: Google Finance is not a new product—it has been around for 20 years, long enough that it initially relied on Flash to display charts and graphs. The website has gotten a few major updates over the years, but it has never had a mobile app until now. Google has released the first standalone app for Google Finance, which is currently exclusive to Android, with iOS planned for later this year.

subject: Google Finance 推出首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候
object: The app is available globally in the Play Store , but that’s not the only update to Google’s financial tracker. The AI-powered makeover for the Finance website is also leaving beta, making Google’s chatbot a core part of the experience. Naturally, the mobile app includes a heaping helping of generative AI that aims to make sense of irrational financial markets.

subject: Google Finance 推出首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候

subject: General Intuition 23亿美元估值
object: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world

subject: General Intuition 23亿美元估值
object: As soon as I entered General Intuition’s R&D floor at its New York office, the company’s 31-year-old co-founder and CEO Pim de Witte directed my attention to a monitor perched on a standing desk. Someone appeared to be playing something like Fortnite. It wasn’t a person.

subject: General Intuition 23亿美元估值
object: An agentic model that can generalize from gameplay to simulation to embodiment is General Intuition’s raison d’être. And that model’s ability to figure out its place in the world has secured the backing of some heavy hitters.

subject: General Intuition 23亿美元估值
object: On Thursday, General Intuition said it raised $320 million at a $2.3 billion valuation, confirming TechCrunch’s previous reporting . The round brings General Intuition’s total disclosed funding to $454 million, after the $134 million round it raised at launch last October.

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: OpenAI’s release of its newest model, GPT 5.6, reportedly won’t be like its previous releases. Instead of distributing it to the public, the company plans to share it only with a select group of close partners because the Trump administration told it to, reports The Information .

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added autoMode.classifyAllShell setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and /permissions recent denials

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added claude_code.assistant_response OpenTelemetry log event containing the model's response text. Redacted unless OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=1 ; when that var is unset it follows OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS , so deployments that already log prompt content will start receiving response content on upgrade — set OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=0 to keep prompts-only.

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added automatic memory-pressure reaping for idle background shell commands (disable with CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BG_SHELL_PRESSURE_REAP=1 )
